Update portfolio: new About me section and cleanup

- Updated About me description with concise highlights
- Adjusted layout margin for better text alignment
- Removed unnecessary files (index.php, components.html, source maps)
- Deleted redundant CV formats (kept PDF only)
- Removed large gemini.png (using optimized webp version)
- Cleaned up IDE cache files

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
